headline: ANET Capitalizes on AI Infrastructure Spending: More Upside Ahead?
summary: ANET is riding the AI infrastructure boom as hyperscalers expand networks, boosting growth, outlook and demand for next-gen Ethernet.

headline: Is Merck & Co. Stock Outperforming the S&P 500?
summary: Merck & Co. has surged past the S&P 500 Index over the past year, and analysts remain somewhat optimistic about the stock’s growth potential.
